description: MLTK saved model for human DBSCAN
MLTK saved model for machine DBSCAN
Account identifier (human username in firstname.lastname format)
Source file path (sole machine entity identifier; 1-to-1 with service account in production)
Shannon entropy of file content (0.0 to 8.0)
Number of send-side log events for this transfer
Number of receive-side log events for this transfer
Mean file size across all transfers for this entity
Standard deviation of file size (floored at 1)
Total transfer count in the baseline window
Count of distinct file extensions observed
Multivalue list of all observed file extensions
Most common extension (approximate; alphabetical first from values())
Standard deviation of integrity ratio (floored at 0.05)
Computed integrity ratio (intermediate field in BL-004)
Binary mismatch indicator (intermediate field in BL-004)
Epoch timestamp of last baseline rebuild
Count of transfers within a single concrete time window
Mean transfers per window for entity+time pattern
Standard deviation of transfers per window (floored at 0.5)
Maximum transfers observed in any single window
Number of distinct windows in the baseline sample
Raw integrity ratio computed at scoring time (intermediate)
Feature F06: 1 if extension not in baseline ext_list (uses mvfind)
Feature F10: 1 if SendEventCount or ReceiverEventCount is 0/null
Feature F13: sqrt(sum(zscore^2) / 5) across 5 z-score features
Lookup alias: avg_file_size from baseline join
Lookup alias: stdev_file_size from baseline join
Lookup alias: avg_entropy from baseline join
Lookup alias: stdev_entropy from baseline join
Lookup alias: ext_list from baseline join
Lookup alias: avg_ext_per_transfer from baseline join
Lookup alias: stdev_ext_per_transfer from baseline join
Lookup alias: distinct_ext_count from baseline join
Lookup alias: avg_integrity_ratio from baseline join
Lookup alias: stdev_integrity_ratio from baseline join
Lookup alias: avg_transfers_per_window from volume baseline join
Lookup alias: stdev_transfers_per_window from volume baseline join
Current window transfer count from eventstats
MD5 hash of z-score features for traceability
